headline: Stock Market Week Ahead: Rotating, For Now, Away From The AI Boom
summary: Recent action suggests that hyperscalers and other AI boom stocks may be passing the baton to other stock market sectors.

headline: Nike: A Better Business Than A Better Stock
summary: Nike (NKE) turnaround analysis: athlete focus, innovation and wholesale reset. Margins stabilize but inventory/market share lag; valuation rich. See more here.
